name: claude-auto-dream
description: Automatic memory consolidation for Claude Code — replicates Anthropic's auto-dream feature with any LLM provider

plugins.name: claude-auto-dream
plugins.description: Automatically consolidates session learnings into memory files at the end of each Claude Code session. Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, DashScope, Ollama and any OpenAI-compatible API. Features throttle gates (24h + 5 sessions), tool permission sandboxing, and multi-provider configuration.
